category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a regular expressions library forked from Oniguruma; official README at https://github.com/k-takata/Onigmo describes Onigmo as a regular expressions library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title/README uses "Onigmo (Oniguruma-mod)" at https://github.com/k-takata/Onigmo; source_facts.name is onigmo.
docs_sources: Official README links to the project wiki and points users to doc/API for the API and doc/RE for regular expression documentation at https://github.com/k-takata/Onigmo.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/k-takata/Onigmo, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and the official README at https://github.com/k-takata/Onigmo identify Onigmo as a regular expression library forked from Oniguruma and used by Ruby.
